_comment: 54 rectangular 20x5x2mm magnets on outer surface of 4" cast iron tube
_geometry: tube OD=4in=101.6mm -> inner_r=50.8mm; magnet radial=2mm -> outer_r=52.8mm, center_r=51.8mm; 5mm tangential -> arc=5.532deg at center_r; 20mm axial; pitch=6.667deg, gap=1.135deg~1.01mm at inner surface
_magnets: 20x5x2mm NdFeB N52, radially magnetized, alternating N/S
